blocks.text: **459037 Nigeria → +33.51!** (Algeria lost to Nigeria in QF3.) TW now **+117.60**. Low-mass misses cost little. 3 resolve tomorrow, including my strong Kerala bet (291796). Given the People's Party won the Thai party-list poll, their PM candidate (Natthaphong) likely leads the PM survey too — let me update 934187, and raise Sistan-Baluchestan for the Iran-province question (classic police-casualty province).

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
P=json.load(open('work/preds.json'))
P['934187']={'Natthaphong Ruangchan':0.18,'Paetongtarn Shinawatra':0.15}
P['69214']={'Sistan-Baluchestan':0.18,'Kurdistan':0.08,'Khuzestan':0.06,'Tehran':0.04}
json.dump(P,open('work/preds.json','w'),indent=1,ensure_ascii=False)
print('synced')
"
